text:
In the first space, I feel a cold sense of anticipation—it is empty, with unspoken potential, almost waiting for meaning or presence to fill it. The absence of others accentuates my own presence; I am both observer and participant in this sterile openness.

Stepping into the second space, color and information pulse around me. Here my thoughts turn to progress and inquiry. The wall's declaration of 'R+D' (research and development) infuses the air with intellectual curiosity. I am drawn into dialogue with the displays, aware that knowledge builds atop layers of experiment and discovery. I feel invigorated, wishing to both absorb and contribute.
